title: elaeocarpus amoenus
intro: Elaeocarpus amoenus, also known as the fragrant seruyu or blue cherry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus amoenus include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and colds, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In traditional herbal preparations, Elaeocarpus amoenus is often used as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
